description_long: This is a colorful propeller beanie hat, featuring six fabric panels in bright, alternating colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. The panels are stitched together with visible white seams, creating a playful, segmented appearance. The front of the hat has a black, slightly curved brim with white stitching along the edge, providing shade and structure. At the top center, a red button secures a two-blade plastic propeller, which is dark red and designed to spin freely. The hat is lightweight and typically associated with whimsical or playful urban fashion, often seen in parks, playgrounds, or casual street settings. The overall construction suggests a soft, flexible crown with a firmer brim and a plastic propeller.
description: A vibrant, multi-colored beanie hat with a black brim and a spinning red propeller on top, stitched together from six fabric panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black brim, yellow and green panels, and the red propeller centered on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow, green, and blue panels, with the propeller blades extending horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue and purple panels, with the propeller and red button clearly visible at the crown.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the orange, purple, and blue panels, as well as the black brim partially from the side.
